Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore

Interface LightcorePackage.Literals

Enclosing interface:
LightcorePackage
public static interface LightcorePackage.Literals
Defines literals for the meta objects that represent
  • each class,
  • each feature of each class,
  • each enum,
  • and each data type

  • Field Summary

    Fields

    Description
